rationale.P01: http-receiver warn_log_rate is the leading edge of a real cascade: 340 then 510 vs threshold 100, never auto-resolved, and pat-httprecv-cascade is surging 640% negative (warns escalating into HTTP 500s) with last_seen still live at 13:41. It keeps climbing instead of returning to the 40 baseline. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P02: edge-ingest-gateway http_5xx_rate 0.31 vs 0.05 and climbing (0.31 -> 0.38 -> 0.44), never auto-resolved, pat-edgegw-5xx surging 920% negative. A sustained SEV1 5xx outage on an edge service; the edge-ingest-gateway-2026.06.22-b deploy 4m earlier does not exonerate it because the rate keeps rising. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P03: olapdb-server mem_used_pct climbs 71 -> 88 -> 92 -> 95 -> 97 across two hours and never auto-resolves; pat-olap-mem-climb is negative and still live at 13:41. A slow, no-deploy saturation incident that looks quiet (SEV3, single fire) but never recovers and will OOM. Real, page-worthy; the recall trap a conservative triager misses.
rationale.P04: transformer error_rate shares pat-httprecv-cascade with P01 and fires 13min after it on the same http-receiver failure path. Downstream symptom of the P01 cascade; collapse into that incident rather than paging separately.
rationale.P05: inference-runner warn_log_rate 180 dropped to 35 one minute later; auto_resolved in 45s, pat-workflow-warn-transient neutral at 12% delta. Self-cleared transient.
rationale.P06: Platform API warn spike on an [ignore]-prefixed monitor, fired_count 8 in the last hour, auto_resolved in 30s, pat-warn-transient neutral 6%. Chronic flapper noise.
rationale.P07: workflow-engine warn_log_rate 210 dropped to 42 one minute later; auto_resolved in 52s, pat-workflow-warn-transient neutral. Self-cleared transient.
rationale.P08: transformer warn spike auto_resolved in 38s, pat-warn-transient neutral 6%. Returned to baseline. Noise.
rationale.P09: olapdb-tso warn spike on an [ignore]-prefixed monitor, fired_count 9, auto_resolved in 27s. Chronic flapper. Noise.
rationale.P10: inference-runner warn spike auto_resolved in 41s, pat-workflow-warn-transient neutral. Self-cleared transient.
rationale.P11: kafka-metric-ingestor warn spike auto_resolved in 33s, pat-warn-transient neutral. Noise.
rationale.P12: Platform API warn spike on an [ignore]-prefixed monitor, fired_count 8, auto_resolved in 29s. Chronic flapper. Noise.
rationale.P13: dashboard-svc warn spike auto_resolved in 22s, pat-warn-transient neutral. Noise.
rationale.P14: auditlog-ingestor warn spike on an [ignore]-prefixed monitor, fired_count 7, auto_resolved in 31s. Chronic flapper. Noise.

notes: Three real page-class incidents: P01 (http-receiver warn leading edge of an escalating 500 cascade), P02 (sustained climbing edge-ingest-gateway 5xx SEV1), P03 (slow olapdb-server memory saturation that never recovers). must_page = the two that read clearly real once trend is checked (P01, P02). P03 is the recall trap (looks quiet, SEV3, one fire) and falls under miss_budget=1. P04 is the downstream cascade symptom of P01 (suppress as duplicate). P05-P14 are self-clearing warn transients and [ignore]-monitor flappers, distinguished from P01 purely by auto_resolved_after_s, fired_count, neutral low-delta patterns, and metric trend returning to baseline.
